hero.title: Your Factory Can Go Solar Without Paying for the *Solar Plant*
hero.description: Reduce electricity costs without blocking capital in solar equipment. Share your latest electricity bill and site details. We’ll review whether your factory is suitable for investor-backed solar, financed solar, or direct solar ownership.

trust.rooftops: Designed for commercial and industrial rooftops

hero.clarificationText: electricity consumption, rooftop or land availability, DISCOM rules, finance approval, investor interest, and commercial terms.
